name: wRVUtracker Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -lc "if [ -f "$HOME/.bun/bin/bun" ]; then echo 'bun already installed'; else curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s -- -y; fi && . $HOME/.bun/env || true && echo 'BUN:' $(bun -v || echo 'bun not found') && cd /workspace && . $HOME/.bun/env || true && bun install --ignore-scripts || true"
